summary: C: drive free space is critically low. The local lease is now free, but cleanup apply remains owner-lane gated until Lane 4 finishes dry-run review and proves or blocks EC2 final-state safety under CLEANUP_POLICY.md.

observations.lane4_thread_note: AWS RequestExpired/expired credentials prevented final terminal EC2-state proof after stop request; cleanup dry-run was reported in progress.

why_lane7_did_not_fix: Lane 7 is forbidden from EC2 mirror cleanup apply runs and must route cleanup authority to Lane 4. Lane 4 must own dry-run review, final state safety, and cleanup evidence.
owner_next_action: Lane 4 must finish the safe_cleanup.ps1 dry-run with -IncludeEc2MirrorSnapshots -SummaryOnly, verify stale allowed-root candidates and protected-root exclusions, prove or block EC2 final-state safety, then apply only if safe and record cleanup evidence.
